summary: UI/Branding update testing completed successfully. All 12 features tested and verified: MTH branding (no slogan), login form fields, 'Keep me signed in' checkbox, orange color scheme, session persistence (sessionStorage vs localStorage), dashboard header, admin page header with tabs. Both desktop and mobile responsive views working correctly.
passed_tests: Login page shows 'MTH' branding without slogan/tagline - PASS
Login page has Phone Number field with data-testid - PASS
Login page has Password field with data-testid - PASS
Login page has 'Keep me signed in' checkbox - PASS
Sign In button is orange (bg-orange-500) - PASS
White background confirmed on login page - PASS
Login with 'Keep me signed in' unchecked - token stored in sessionStorage only - PASS
Login with 'Keep me signed in' checked - token stored in localStorage with persist flag - PASS
Logout clears all tokens from both storages - PASS
Dashboard 'Create Order' button is orange - PASS
Admin page shows 'MTH | Admin Setup' header - PASS
Admin page tabs highlight in orange (bg-orange-500) when active - PASS
Mobile view - Login page shows 'MTH' branding - PASS
Mobile view - Dashboard 'Create Order' button is orange - PASS
Mobile view - Admin tabs are orange when active - PASS
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/Branding update fully verified. Login page has MTH branding (no slogan), phone/password fields, 'Keep me signed in' checkbox that controls sessionStorage vs localStorage persistence. All primary buttons are orange (bg-orange-500), white background throughout app. Dashboard and Admin pages both show MTH branding in headers. Admin tabs highlight orange when active. Mobile responsive design working correctly.

session_persistence.logout: Clears all tokens from both storages
